verses.text: On the eighth day Aaron is to offer for himself and the people, for 'to day the LORD will appear.' Eighth day. The consecrated priest begins his work.

On the eighth day Aaron is to offer for himself and the people, for 'to day the LORD will appear.' Eighth day. The consecrated priest begins his work.
Moses bids Aaron offer his sin and burnt offerings to make atonement. Atonement. The priest first offers for himself.
Moses bids Aaron offer his sin and burnt offerings to make atonement. Atonement. The priest first offers for himself.
Moses bids Aaron offer his sin and burnt offerings to make atonement. Atonement. The priest first offers for himself.
Aaron offers the sin offering for himself. For himself. The priest needs cleansing too.

Aaron offers the sin offering for himself. For himself. The priest needs cleansing too.
He offers his burnt offering. Burnt. He gives himself wholly to God.
He offers his burnt offering. Burnt. He gives himself wholly to God.
He offers his burnt offering. Burnt. He gives himself wholly to God.
He offers the people's sin, burnt, and meat offerings. For the people. He atones for all.
He offers the people's sin, burnt, and meat offerings. For the people. He atones for all.
He offers the people's sin, burnt, and meat offerings. For the people. He atones for all.
He offers the peace offerings and waves the breast. Peace. Fellowship is sealed.
He offers the peace offerings and waves the breast. Peace. Fellowship is sealed.

Aaron blesses the people; the glory appears, and fire consumes the offering. Glory and fire. God accepts the sacrifice with fire.
